channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ottawa Senators move closer to securing NHL playoff berth with win over Islanders
item.description: The Ottawa Senators delivered a strong performance on Saturday, defeating the New York Islanders 3-0 and moving closer to securing a spot in the NHL playoffs. Ridly Greig scored a short-handed goal at...

item.title: Governor Mutahi Kahiga Signals Plan to Run for Nyeri Senate in 2027 as His Final Term Nears End
item.description: Nyeri Governor Mutahi Kahiga has signaled that he might seek the Nyeri Senate seat in 2027 once his second and final term as county boss ends. Speaking during the 12th Nyeri County Prayer Breakfast, K...

item.title: Lesufi Appoints EFF to Gauteng Finance Department to Ensure Budget Stability
item.description: Gauteng Premier Panyaza Lesufi has defended his decision to hand over the province’s finance department to the Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF), claiming it is a strategic move to ensure political stab...

item.title: Man fatally shot by police after stabbing three people at Grand Central Station
item.description: Police in New York City shot and killed a man who attacked multiple commuters with a machete at Grand Central subway station. The suspect, identified as 44-year-old Anthony Griffin, reportedly told of...

item.title: Lachlan Kennedy claims Australian 100m title with another sub-10-second sprint
item.description: Lachlan Kennedy continued his rise in Australian sprinting by winning the men’s 100 metres at the national championships in Sydney with another sub-10-second run. The 22-year-old Queenslander clocked ...

item.title: Rajnath Singh assures adequate fuel reserves in India amid West Asia tensions
item.description: During his visit to Lucknow, Defence Minister Rajnath Singh reassured citizens that India has adequate reserves of petrol, diesel, and cooking gas, and there is no reason to panic amid the ongoing ten...

item.title: Over a thousand candidates begin 2026 local elections across New Brunswick
item.description: Hundreds of campaign efforts are now formally underway across New Brunswick as the province prepares for local government, education council and rural advisory committee elections. According to Electi...

item.title: Bournemouth defeat Arsenal, tightening Premier League title race
item.description: Bournemouth pulled off a major upset at the Emirates Stadium on Saturday, defeating league leaders Arsenal 2-1 and reigniting the Premier League title race. Alex Scott scored the decisive goal in the ...

item.title: Akira Morishita Delivers Justin Timberlake-Inspired Performance in 'The Grand Showdown'
item.description: Singer Akira Morishita really brought the house down on ABS-CBN's 'The Grand Showdown,' pulling off a performance heavily inspired by the iconic Justin Timberlake. The act, which aired on April 11, 20...

item.title: Chakwera Consults Tanzania Election Inquiry Commission on Post-Poll Violence
item.description: Former Malawi President and Commonwealth envoy, Dr Lazarus Chakwera, held a two-hour meeting with Tanzania's Commission of Inquiry on April 11, 2026, in Dar es Salaam. The discussion centered on the c...

item.title: Vice President Nchimbi Urges Leaders to Serve Citizens, Not Personal Interests
item.description: Tanzania Vice President Dr Emmanuel Nchimbi has cautioned leaders to avoid abusing the power given to them by citizens. Speaking at a youth symposium organised by the Mwalimu Nyerere Foundation in Dod...

item.title: Tyson Fury Returns to the Ring Against Arslanbek Makhmudov at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium
item.description: The Daily Mail's live coverage of the Tyson Fury vs. Arslanbek Makhmudov bout offered round-by-round updates and insight into one of the most anticipated events in British boxing. Taking place at the ...

item.title: Tanzania ends teacher training initiative with focus on long-term sustainability
item.description: The Government of Tanzania, together with its global partners, wrapped up the Teacher Education Support Project (TESP) with a renewed call for sustainability and accountability in the country’s educat...

item.title: Lagos State Gives Final Extension For Filing 2026 Income Tax Returns
item.description: The Lagos State Internal Revenue Service (LIRS) don announce say dem don extend the deadline for filing individual annual income tax returns. The original deadline wey suppose end on April 14, 2026, d...

item.title: Bilawal highlights significance of Islamabad-hosted US-Iran talks and ceasefire
item.description: Former Foreign Minister and PPP Chairman Bilawal Bhutto-Zardari has described the ongoing US-Iran talks in Islamabad as the most significant step yet in de-escalating tensions in the Middle East. In a...

item.title: Sofia Levin on how personal loss has shaped her role as a MasterChef judge
item.description: Sofia Levin, the 36-year-old food writer and current judge on MasterChef Australia, approaches food as a lens through which to understand culture, history and human connection. In an interview ahead o...

item.title: Orange County Dental Assistant Receives Life Sentence for Assaulting Three Young Girls
item.description: Tommy Medina, a former dental assistant at O.C. Kids Dental Care in Santa Ana, California, has been sentenced to 15 years to life in prison after being found guilty of sexually assaulting three young ...

item.title: Ukrainian forces report ongoing Russian drone strikes during Easter ceasefire
item.description: Despite the Kremlin declaring a 32-hour Easter ceasefire, Russian drone attacks continued against Ukrainian positions, according to Ukrainian military sources. Serhii Kolesnychenko of the 148th Separa...

item.title: Stakeholders Discuss Sustainable Black Soldier Fly Larvae Feed for Nigerian Livestock
item.description: For Nigeria, livestock feed dey become big wahala as demand dey grow well-well, but supply dey short. Dr. Tunde Amole, Country Rep for International Livestock Research Institute (ILRI) Ibadan, talk sa...

item.title: BINI receives recognition from Forbes following Coachella performance
item.description: Filipino girl group BINI has recently captured international attention after their performance at the globally renowned Coachella music festival. Forbes magazine highlighted the members for their char...
